_provenance: wave-1 live gate (2026-07-03): the `response` half is REAL bytes captured from a live `a2a-bridge serve` driving a real codex-acp agent over a SendMessage call. The `request` half is a RECONSTRUCTION of the shape actually sent (SendMessage with message.contextId + message.text + message.metadata['a2a-bridge.agent']) -- only the response was captured raw, so this request text is a plausible stand-in, not verbatim captured bytes. Scrubbed of machine paths/hostnames; ids replaced with obvious placeholders (task-1 is also the server's real synthesized stub id for a taskId-less SendMessage, not a scrub placeholder).

message.text: Reply with exactly the single token PONG and nothing else.
